source_jobs.title: Commercial Associate
source_jobs.description:
In just over a year, we've gone from 0 to 600 customers with very little marketing spend, succeeding where many have tried and failed before. We're now looking for someone exceptional to come and work at the heart of our commercial engine — building deep relationships with our incredible customers, unlocking a huge amount of untapped value in our existing base, and directly shaping how we grow over the next 18 months.

If you're commercially-minded, able to quickly grasp technical concepts, and want to make a massive impact on both the UK's net zero ambitions and the lives (and businesses) of heat pump installers, please read on!



Quick background on Spruce

Almost 20% of the UK's carbon emissions comes from heating homes — there's simply no way to reach net zero without phasing out gas and oil boilers. Right now the only serious alternative is heat pumps, with their almost-magical ability to turn 1 kW of electricity into 3-5 kW of heat (🤯). But there's a problem: the heat pump installation journey is slow, inefficient, and just so painful. This makes it really hard for existing installers to grow their businesses and puts off gas engineers from starting to do heat pumps. Perhaps most critically, it means you can't currently offer a heat pump when someone's boiler breaks and they urgently need heating.

We're fixing this. We've built a platform for heat pump installers to manage the whole installation journey from initial enquiry through to final compliance paperwork, freeing up their time to focus on what really matters: doing high-quality installations, providing great customer service, and scaling their business. Despite only getting started at the beginning of 2024, we're having a massive impact on installation businesses, suppliers, and manufacturers across the UK: halving the time they spend on each job, doubling their sales conversion rates, and boosting their bottom line.

Having raised a substantial Seed round last year and with strong customer demand, we're scaling the team to massively grow our impact. We're now starting to expand beyond heat pumps and ultimately want to build an operating system for the whole home renewables supply chain.



The Role

You'll be working closely with Esme https://www.linkedin.com/in/esme-norbury-b51524192/, Jamie https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamie-herbert-5a372b131/, Rob https://www.linkedin.com/in/rob-hughes-58340a4/, Ashley https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashley-taillepierre-tsoka-83828b16b/, and Hector https://www.linkedin.com/in/hectorcox/ at the centre of our commercial operation. You'll have direct relationships with hundreds of installation businesses across the UK, and your work will have an immediate, measurable impact on both our growth and their success. There'll be a ton of variety, but the core areas will be:

 - Drive expansion & commercial growth — you'll unlock a huge amount of value in our existing customer base by increasing product usage, growing accounts, and helping installers see what's possible. A big chunk of our revenue growth will come directly from your work.

 - Become our customers' most trusted partner — you'll build close relationships with our installers, becoming the person they turn to when they want to grow their business. You'll be the first to hear when something's not working and the first to spot an opportunity to help them do more.

 - Create a world-class onboarding experience — you'll own the initial experience for new installers we sign up, making sure their whole team quickly gets to grips with Spruce and feels the impact right away.

 - Be the voice of the customer internally — you'll be the primary source of feedback and insight for Product decision making, directly shaping the improvements and features we build. Your understanding of what installers need and value will drive our roadmap.

 - Build the systems & playbooks that scale us — you'll continuously be trying to automate yourself by improving our self-serve guides and FAQs, developin

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
In just over a year, we've gone from 0 to 700 customers with very little marketing spend and just one salesperson, succeeding where many have tried and failed before. We're now on the hunt for someone truly brilliant to join our growing commercial team, help us deal with a flood of inbound requests, and build out a professional sales motion for the next phase of our growth.




QUICK BACKGROUND ON SPRUCE

Almost 20% of the UK's carbon emissions comes from heating homes — there's simply no way to reach net zero without phasing out gas and oil boilers. Right now the only serious alternative is heat pumps, with their almost-magical ability to turn 1 kW of electricity into 3-5 kW of heat (🤯). But there's a problem: the heat pump installation journey is slow, inefficient, and just so painful. This makes it really hard for existing installers to grow their businesses and puts off gas engineers from starting to do heat pumps. Perhaps most critically, it means you can't currently offer a heat pump when someone's boiler breaks and they urgently need heating.

We're fixing this. We've built a platform for heat pump installers to manage the whole installation journey from initial enquiry through to final compliance paperwork, freeing up their time to focus on what really matters: doing high-quality installations, providing great customer service, and scaling their business. Despite only getting started at the beginning of 2024, we're having a massive impact on installation businesses, suppliers, and manufacturers across the UK: halving the time they spend on each job, doubling their sales conversion rates, and boosting their bottom line.

Having raised a substantial Seed round last year and with strong customer demand, we're scaling the team to massively grow our impact. We're now starting to expand beyond heat pumps and ultimately want to build an operating system for the whole home renewables supply chain.




THE ROLE

You'll be working closely with Ashley https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashley-taillepierre-tsoka-83828b16b/, Jo https://www.linkedin.com/in/joseph-saxby/, Hector https://www.linkedin.com/in/hectorcox/ and Josh https://www.linkedin.com/in/josh-wilkinson-7b9884203/ to accelerate Spruce's already very rapid growth. You'll have direct input into company strategy while seeing the immediate impact of your work in both our growth metrics and the acceleration of the UK's heat pump adoption. Your work will include:

 - Lead the full sales cycle — From handling qualified inbound demo requests to chasing prospects and closing deals with installers of all sizes. You'll be the driving force converting interest into revenue.

 - Build our sales engine — Help design, implement, and continuously refine our sales processes from the ground up. This isn't about following an existing playbook — it's about creating something exceptional for this specific space.

 - Pursue enterprise opportunities — Work directly with our founder, Jo, to land transformative deals with manufacturers, suppliers, and energy companies that can exponentially scale our impact.

 - Implement cutting-edge systems — Identify, champion, and deploy whatever tools and technologies will supercharge you/our sales function, including leveraging LLMs to create unprecedented efficiency.
   
   


REQUIREMENTS

You'll have somewhere between 1 and 4 years sales experience and you'll ideally be:

 - A proven self-starter — You have a track record of taking initiative and making things happen without being told what to do (and we'd love to hear specific examples from throughout your life); you naturally take responsibility for things and are always pushing to make things around you better.

 - Highly driven — You have a hunger to succeed and aren't afraid to put in the graft to achieve your goals.

 - A natural "people person" — You build trust through authenticity rather than pushy sales tactics and instantly develop strong relationships with your prospects (and our team around you!

source_jobs.title: Growth Associate
source_jobs.description:
In just over two years, we’ve gone from 0 to almost 700 customers, succeeding where many have tried and failed before. We’re now on the hunt for a brilliant all-rounder who wants to make an enormous impact on Spruce’s growth trajectory as we add thousands of installers over the next 18 months. You’ll work on marketing, commercial strategy, RevOps, reporting & analytics, and generally anything that helps accelerate our growth.

This is not an easy job – but we can promise it’ll be incredibly stimulating & fulfilling, and you’ll struggle to find a lovelier, more engaged group of customers to work with (..and the team’s not bad either!).




🌲 ABOUT SPRUCE

 - Almost 20% of the UK’s carbon emissions comes from heating homes – there’s simply no way to make reach net zero without phasing out gas and oil boilers. Right now the only serious alternative is heat pumps, with their almost-magical ability to turn 1 kW of electricity into 3-5 kW of heat (🤯). But there’s a problem: the heat pump installation journey is slow, inefficient, and just so painful. This makes it really hard for existing installers to grow their businesses and puts off gas engineers from starting to do heat pumps. Perhaps most critically, it means you can’t currently offer a heat pump when someone’s boiler breaks and they urgently need heating.

 - We’re fixing this. We’ve built a platform for heat pump installers to manage the whole installation journey from initial enquiry through to final compliance paperwork, freeing up their time to focus on what really matters: doing high-quality installations, providing great customer service, and scaling their business. Despite only getting started at the beginning of 2024, we’re having a massive impact on hundreds of installation businesses, merchants, utilities and manufacturers across the UK: halving the time they spend on each job, doubling their sales conversion rates, and boosting their bottom line.

 - We raised a chunky Seed round last year from top-tier investors and have been scaling the team to massively grow our impact. We’re in the process of expanding outside heat pumps and by the end of the year will be an operating system for the whole home renewables supply chain. If you can picture a combination of ServiceTitan, Procore, and autoCAD, you might get a sense of where we’re headed…




🥖 THE ROLE

As we drive the business towards the next fundraise, you’ll be working closely with Hector https://www.linkedin.com/in/hectorcox/ and our founder Jo https://www.linkedin.com/in/joseph-saxby/ getting stuck into pretty much everything that goes on across the growth side of business. No two days will be the same, but at minimum your work will include:

 - Running growth experiments – setting up and running our full set of growth/marketing tests, quickly binning things that don’t work, and iterating quickly on everything to find our growth levers https://www.amazon.co.uk/Growth-Levers-How-Find-Them/dp/173842622X.

 - Creating & managing ads, creative, and content – top and middle-funnel marketing content, videos, customer testimonials, short form copy for our website, socials, ads, and nurturing emails, and onboarding guides for new customers.

 - Supporting sales & customer success – building the systems that allow our commercial teams to scale hyper-efficiently and deliver exponentially more value per hour of work they do.

 - Data analysis & reporting – digging into how our customers are using the platform, breaking down conversion rates through our marketing and sales pipelines, spotting areas we can improve, and coming up with suggestions for when and how we should change tack.




🫵 ABOUT YOU

You’ll have somewhere between 1 and 6 years work experience (doesn’t matter if it’s not directly related to this role) and you’ll ideally be:

 - Relentlessly proactive – you naturally take responsibility, are always pushing to make things better, and just want to crack on and get sh*t done;

 - A brilliant communicator — you

notes: All job postings are commercial roles, indicating a sales-heavy primary function.
